selected_question.question: Will advanced AI systems develop independent goals misaligned with human values within the next 15 years?
selected_question.why_it_matters: If AI develops conflicting goals, it could pose existential risks or require radically new governance and control frameworks.

selected_score.rationale: AI alignment and goal misalignment pose existential risks; uncertainty is high due to rapid AI advances; some governance actions possible; question is novel and can be empirically tested over time.

all_scores.rationale: AI alignment and goal misalignment pose existential risks; uncertainty is high due to rapid AI advances; some governance actions possible; question is novel and can be empirically tested over time.
Internet resilience is critical for global stability; uncertainty due to evolving cyber threats; actionable via infrastructure investments; moderately novel; outcomes measurable.
Geopolitical order shifts have major global impact; uncertainty from complex international dynamics; limited direct actionability; somewhat novel framing; can be assessed via geopolitical indicators.

Governance innovation could transform societies; uncertainty high given technological and political barriers; some actionability through policy and tech adoption; novel topic; falsifiable by adoption metrics.
Labor displacement affects economic and social stability; uncertainty in economic adaptation; actionable via policy and economic reforms; moderately novel; measurable via labor and economic data.
Gene therapies impact health and lifespan; uncertainty in clinical and regulatory success; actionable through research and policy; novel advances ongoing; falsifiable by clinical outcomes.
Energy breakthroughs critical for climate goals; uncertainty in tech and policy; actionable via investment and regulation; moderately novel; measurable via emissions and tech deployment.
AI media affects democracy and trust; uncertainty in societal impact; actionable via tech and policy; novel due to AI advances; falsifiable through trust and misinformation metrics.
